candidate_definition_hints.text: Support for miscellaneous image models. Currently supports: DiT, PixArt, HunYuanDiT, MiaoBi, and a few VAEs.
This repository aims to add support for various different image diffusion models to ComfyUI.

candidate_glosses.text: This repository aims to add support for various different image diffusion models to ComfyUI.
